en: What do I need to do to be promoted from Assistant Archie to full-blown professional Archie?
Well, actually, Saltine, it's not up to me.
It's time to let you in on one of archaeology's most closely guarded secrets.
In order to become officially licensed, you must complete the Archie Trials.
I've taken a solemn oath, so I can't divulge mucho, but do know this.
The Trials are a series of treacherous tests you must pass to prove you have what it takes to be an Archie.
And as your role model and sole heir...
Who else would I leave my cap to?
It pains me to say, I don't think you're ready.
